memberdef.name: GF

para.bold: Return frequency, not stored in adcending order

memberdef.name: p_les

para.bold: Return pointer to specific data in pointer for lesser component

memberdef.argsstring: (int w_idx, int i, int j) const
memberdef.name: p_ret

para.bold: Return pointer to specific data in pointer for retarded component
Class GF represents Green's functions in either time or frequency domain.

blockquote.para: This class contains the data structures for representing complex matrix valued Green's functions on a time or frequency grid, stored in two data arrays for retarded and lesser component.

node.label: Map< Eigen::Matrix< cplx, Eigen::Dynamic, Eigen::Dynamic, Eigen::RowMajor > >
std::vector< Eigen::Map< Eigen::Matrix< cplx, Eigen::Dynamic, Eigen::Dynamic, Eigen::RowMajor > > >
